query:
-- Listede olmayan sicilli personelleri pasif yap
UPDATE public.personnel p
SET is_active = false, updated_at = now()
WHERE p.registration_number IS NOT NULL
  AND trim(p.registration_number) <> ''
  AND upper(trim(p.registration_number)) NOT IN ('A033148', 'A033792', 'A034483', 'A035105', 'A035168', 'A036227', 'A036257', 'A036401', 'A036707', 'A036998', 'A037032', 'A037031', 'A037437', 'A037620', 'A037970', 'A037999', 'A038030', 'A038387', 'A038405', 'A038422', 'A038603', 'A039472', 'A039766', 'A040333', 'A040608', 'A041716', 'A037908', 'A043892', 'A043982', 'A044067', 'A044267', 'A044400', 'A044431', 'A044572', 'A045766', 'A045819', 'A045869', 'A038675', 'A015480', 'A046385', 'A046404', 'A046395', 'A046499', 'A046527', 'A046607', 'A046700', 'A046723', 'A047204', 'A047262', 'A047456', 'A049041', 'A049428', 'A050350', 'A050403', 'A050411', 'A050525', 'A050917', 'A044190', 'A038697', 'A052920', 'A053103', 'A016417', 'A053462', 'A004029', 'A053800', 'A054036', 'A054040', 'A054642', 'A054738', 'A055136', 'A055258', 'A055713', 'A056349', 'A056762', 'A056786', 'A057908', 'A057966', 'A057952', 'A058022', 'A058123', 'A044943', 'A030290', 'A036956', 'A058276', 'A058280', 'A058360', 'A058593', 'A058691', 'A058901', 'A058961', 'A038604', 'A059417', 'A045436', 'A059745', 'A059783', 'A059919', 'A059924', 'A001075', 'A060225', 'A050636', 'A060232', 'A060596', 'A060682', 'A060724', 'A060732', 'A060782', 'A060861', 'A060864', 'A060875', 'A060959', 'A060949', 'A061015', 'A061063', 'A061140', 'A061290', 'A061336', 'A061362', 'A061367', 'A062061', 'A062141', 'A062295', 'A062345', 'A062440', 'A062470', 'A031989', 'A062552', 'A060284', 'A048838', 'A067449', 'A067467', 'A067486', 'A067980', 'A067983', 'A067982', 'A068446', 'A068859', 'A068928', 'A068949', 'A068986', 'A069159', 'A036137', 'A069369', 'A069408', 'A069515', 'A034132', 'A069825', 'A069833', 'A069884', 'A069932', 'A069908', 'A070066', 'A070096', 'A070099', 'A070262', 'A070421', 'A070408', 'A070507', 'A070654', 'A070838', 'A032317', 'A058586', 'A070938', 'A071025', 'A071319', 'A071459', 'A071570', 'A072620', 'A072636', 'A072628', 'A072669', 'NS-SALTIKCANKAYNAR-171');

-- Sicili boş olanlar: ad soyad listede yoksa pasif
UPDATE public.personnel p
SET is_active = false, updated_at = now()
WHERE (p.registration_number IS NULL OR trim(p.registration_number) = '')
  AND upper(trim(regexp_replace(p.full_name, '\s+', ' ', 'g'))) NOT IN ('KASIM ÇAKIL', 'HÜSEYİN GÜL', 'ERKAN KOZAK', 'MUSTAFA CEM BİLİR', 'ZAFER ÖZCAN', 'TEOMAN KABAKCI', 'İBRAHİM KILICIKAN', 'MÜCAHİT IRK', 'HİKMET YARAŞ', 'AHMET SAİT KAYA', 'İHSAN GÜVENÇ', 'SÜLEYMAN BAĞCI', 'TAHSİN ÜNVER', 'ONUR ORAK', 'SEYFETTİN YAKICI', 'SİNAN ÇELİK', 'DURMUŞ YARAŞ', 'SABRİ CAN ÇEVİK', 'RAMAZAN BOZTİLKİ', 'SELMAN KÜÇÜKTUNÇ', 'OKAN BİRİCİK', 'ARİF BAYRAKCI', 'SEYİT MEHMET YETİŞMİŞ', 'METİN TÜRKMEN', 'OSMAN GÜLLÜ', 'AHMET KARAPINAR', 'ATİLA ERDEN', 'MAHİR GÜNGÖREN', 'SOFIANE SOUKHAL', 'KEREM AKINCI',
